title: Conflict-Free Additive Codes (Maximum Sidon Set)
strategies: powers-of-two baseline conflict-free code (trivial, ~log2 n words)
increasing-order greedy / Mian-Chowla maximal Sidon set
multi-restart randomized-order greedy keeping the largest maximal Sidon set
Erdos-Turan / Singer quadratic-residue construction then greedy augmentation
